metadata.description: A collection of Claude Code plugins for language, development, and investment

plugins.name: doc
plugins.description: A plugin for reading and searching various document formats including CHM files

plugins.name: jdk-source
plugins.description: View JDK internal source code for Java development and debugging

plugins.name: korea-gov-data
plugins.description: Extract and organize Open API specifications from data.go.kr (Korea Public Data Portal)

plugins.name: dom-analyzer
plugins.description: HTML/XML DOM structure analysis toolkit with hierarchy visualization and CSS selector discovery

plugins.name: a4
plugins.description: a4/ workspace management — wiki + issues spec authoring, usecase / domain / architecture design with task batch derivation (/a4:breakdown) and autonomous implementation, brainstorming, and decision-making

plugins.name: obsidian
plugins.description: Generate query blocks, modify templates, and guide plugin usage for Obsidian knowledge management (Dataview, Tasks, Jira Issue, Templater, CLI)

plugins.name: plantuml
plugins.description: PlantUML diagram reference, creation, and validation plugin

plugins.name: structurizr
plugins.description: Structurizr DSL diagram composition, C4 model visualization, and architecture documentation plugin

plugins.name: d2
plugins.description: D2 diagram composition, rendering, and visualization plugin

plugins.name: spawn
plugins.description: Spawn and orchestrate child Claude Code sessions in iTerm2 with session lifecycle management

plugins.name: dev-rules
plugins.description: Inject coding rule sets (logging conventions; extensible by category) into Claude's context on file edits via PreToolUse hook. Rulesets are organized as `rulesets/<category>/<key>.md`; the hook emits absolute pointer paths (not bodies) with an imperative read directive so the model Reads the rule files itself, landing them in the transcript as its own tool-result. Per `<category>:<key>` dedup keeps each pointer to once per session.
